title: Reconcile Account
subtitle: Match your records against your bank statement

setup.title: Start Reconciliation
setup.intro: Reconcile your account against a bank statement to ensure your records match.

list.heading: Unreconciled Transactions ({count})
list.empty: No unreconciled transactions found for this period.

complete.title: Reconciliation Complete
complete.message: Your account has been successfully reconciled as of {date}.
complete.existingPayment: This account has a scheduled payment, {name}. Would you like to update its next instance to the reconciled balance of {amount}?
complete.noPayment: No scheduled payment was found for this account. Would you like to create one for the reconciled balance of {amount}?

toasts.differenceRequired: The difference must be {amount} to finish reconciliation
toasts.success: {count, plural, one {Successfully reconciled # transaction} other {Successfully reconciled # transactions}}
